zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Bridges於1697年5月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利時，她的父親Edward Bridge28歲，母親Mary Brooks30歲。她於1722年11月29日與Joseph Child在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她於1697年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。她去世於1788年1月24日在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bridges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Bridge
meanings: English: from Middle English brigge ‘bridge’, Old English brycg, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, a metonymic occupational name for a bridge keeper, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this element, as for example Bridge in Kent or Bridge Sollers in Herefordshire. Building and maintaining bridges was one of the three main feudal obligations, along with bearing arms and maintaining fortifications. The cost of building a bridge was often defrayed by charging a toll, the surname thus being acquired by the toll gatherer.

variants.name: Bridgen
meanings: habitational name for someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium. Compare   Bridges   2.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Bridges was born on 21 May 1697, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edward Bridge, was 28 and her mother, Mary Brooks, was 30. She married Joseph Child on 29 November 1722, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1697. She died on 24 January 1788, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 90.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Bridgesが1697年5月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward Bridgeは28歳，母Mary Brooksは30歳であった。1722年11月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでJoseph Childと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1697年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼女は1788年1月24日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Bridges(이)가 1697년 5월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Bridge(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Brooks(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1722년 11월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joseph Child(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1697년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 살았다. 그녀는 1788년 1월 24일 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Bridges nasceu em 21 de maio de 1697, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Bridge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Brooks, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Child em 29 de novembro de 1722, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1697. Ela faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1788, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Bridges родилась 21 мая 1697 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edward Bridge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Brooks, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Child 29 ноября 1722 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она жила в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1697 году. Она умерла 24 января 1788 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет.
